[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001111 6
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 10101011 5
4 01001000 2
5 11111101 7
6 01100110 4
7 10011000 3

01 10 00001000 1
12 21 01001000 2 match 4
23 32 01100100 3
34 43 00000000 a match 1 2
45 54 00001000 1
56 65 00000000 a match 1 2
67 76 00000000 a match 1 2
70 07 10001011 4

02 20 10101001 4
13 31 01000000 1
24 42 10011000 3 match 7
35 53 01000110 3
46 64 00000000 a match 1 2
57 75 01001110 4
60 06 00100000 1
71 17 01001000 2 match 4

03 30 00100010 2
14 41 00001000 1
25 52 01001100 3
36 63 00100000 1
47 74 10001000 2
50 05 00001010 2
61 16 00000000 a match 1 2
72 27 11001101 5

26 62 00100000 1
37 73 01000110 3
